purpose: Task-to-file routing map for AI agents working on the SDK repository.

domains.title: Consumer runtime client
use_when: discovery, search, invoke, receipt, usage logs, or runtime SDK errors change
Python SynapseClient or TypeScript SynapseClient behavior changes
PRICE_MISMATCH rediscovery or typed runtime errors change
notes: Canonical runtime flow is discovery/search plus price-asserted invoke plus receipt.
Do not restore old quote-first gateway calls.

domains.title: Owner auth and credential lifecycle
use_when: wallet auth, JWT cache, balance, deposit intent, credentials, quota, or audit logs change
SynapseAuth owner methods change in Python or TypeScript
notes: Credential and finance-adjacent helpers must not log real tokens or secrets.
High-impact finance helpers may wrap API calls, but should not auto-execute irreversible user actions.
Public owner-auth returns must use named SDK models/interfaces, not raw dict or Record.

domains.title: Provider lifecycle helpers
use_when: provider secrets, provider facade, provider service registration, service update/delete/ping, registration guide, or provider health changes
notes: Provider onboarding success is measured through owner control-plane service records, not public discovery alone.
Provider is an owner-scoped supply-side role; use auth.provider() / SynapseProvider rather than a separate root identity.
Public provider facade returns must use named SDK models/interfaces, not raw dict or Record.

domains.title: Gateway environment configuration
use_when: local, staging, prod, gateway URL, environment resolver, or public preview defaults change
README or SECURITY guidance for staging/prod changes
notes: Do not reintroduce the retired gateway domain from the old .network namespace.
Explicit gateway URL always wins over environment preset.

domains.title: Public SDK docs and examples
use_when: README, integration guides, provider guides, capability inventory, or public examples change
the product gateway docs need to stay aligned with the SDK repo
staging docs links or fresh-start onboarding flow changes
notes: Public docs should say Public Preview unless production DNS and health checks are verified.
Use agt_xxx or REPLACE_ME placeholders only.
README and gateway docs must show Agent Key -> SynapseClient first, with owner auth -> JWT -> credential issuance under Advanced.

domains.title: CI and quality gates
use_when: GitHub Actions, PR checks, coverage thresholds, lint, build, or repo hygiene gates change
notes: Local scripts and GitHub Actions must share the same entrypoint.
Source files over 500 lines, high complexity, and duplicate code above threshold must fail PR CI.

domains.title: Examples and e2e onboarding plans
use_when: Python examples, TypeScript examples, smoke tests, or e2e onboarding plans change
notes: Provider staging examples require a public HTTPS endpoint, not localhost.
Consumer wallet-to-invoke examples default to free services unless --allow-paid is explicit.
E2E flows may require real staging credentials; PR CI should keep e2e out of the default gate unless explicitly configured.
